title: Dekton 50MM Titanium Plated Iron Padlock | Heavy-Duty Iron Construction with Tough Shackle | Includes 3 Steel Keys | Ideal for Gates, Shed & Storage | Durable Locking Mechanism | Home & Industrial Use
features: Titanium-Plated Iron Construction: The Dekton Iron Padlock features a titanium-plated iron body, offering exceptional durability and resistance to corrosion. This advanced plating enhances the padlock's strength and longevity, making it a reliable choice for securing gates, sheds, and other valuable items.

Tough Shackle for Enhanced Security: Equipped with a hardened steel shackle, this padlock offers superior resistance to cutting and prying. The tough shackle is engineered to provide added protection, making it ideal for securing gates, sheds, and other valuable items.

Includes 3 Steel Keys: The padlock comes with three steel keys, allowing for convenient access and extra copies for family members or authorized users. The keys are designed for smooth operation and reliable performance, ensuring ease of use.

Versatile Applications: Suitable for a variety of uses, this padlock is perfect for securing gates, storage units, sheds, lockers, and more. Its versatile design makes it a practical choice for both residential and industrial settings.

Reliable Locking Mechanism: The Dekton Iron Padlock features a dependable locking mechanism that ensures secure closure and resistance to unauthorized access. Its sturdy build and effective locking system provide peace of mind and enhanced security for your belongings.
description: From the manufacturer 50MM TITANIUM PLATED PADLOCK Titanium plated Iron body. Brass cylinder locking mechanism. Suitable for securing residential/commercial property, factories & garages. A3 Hardened steel shackle. Includes 3 keys. ADVANCED LEVEL OF SECURITY HARDENED STEEL SHACKLE Excellent anti-cut resistance. Heat treated to be harder, safer and cut resistant. TITANIUM PLATED Titanium plated Iron body. Brass cylinder locking mechanism. AVAILABLE IN BOTH STANDARD & LONG SHACKLE Available in both standard and long shackle. Standard sizes include: 40mm, 50mm and 60mm. Long shackle sizes include: 40mm and 50mm. IDEAL FOR SECURING Residential / Commercial property. Factories / Garages. Sheds / Fences. Doors/ Gates. Motorbikes / Bicycles. Tools / Gardening equipment.
